newTypes.name: QuizResultsData
newTypes.definition: interface QuizResultsData { detailedResults: QuizResultDetail[]; summary: QuizSummary; }

newTypes.name: QuizSubmissionRequest
newTypes.definition: interface QuizSubmissionRequest { userId: string; quizData: GeneratedQuiz; results: QuizResultsData; }

newTypes.name: CSPViolationReport
newTypes.definition: interface CSPViolationReport { directive: string; blockedURI: string; sourceFile?: string; }

newTypes.name: AuthenticatedUser
newTypes.definition: interface AuthenticatedUser extends User { isAuthenticated: true; permissions: Permission[]; }

newTypes.name: SafeLogData<T>
newTypes.definition: type SafeLogData<T> = Omit<T, 'password' | 'token' | 'secret'> & { [K in keyof T]?: unknown }

recommendedOrder: 1. Define core type interfaces (QuizResultsData, AuthenticatedUser, CSPViolationReport)
2. Fix critical security-related any types (validation.ts, securityMonitoring.ts)
3. Type API endpoints and request/response objects
4. Update quiz processing and results handling
5. Fix middleware and utility function types
6. Update test files with proper typing
7. Add generic type constraints for sanitization functions
8. Review and optimize null assertion usage

recommendations: Long-term: Complete elimination of any types
Add ESLint rules to prevent new any type introduction
